---
title: "test_pennyone_phase2_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_phase2_empire.ts"
loc: 60
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.30
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 5.33
overall_score: 5.83
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [analyzeFile](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/analyzer.js)
- [calculateStyleScore](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/calculus/style.js)
- [writeReport](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/writer.js)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `code`
- `result`
- `code`
- `result`
- `backendCode`
- `score`
- `mockFile`
- `targetDir`
- `qmdPath`
- `statsExist`
